name: Meta Platforms, Inc.

profile.description: Meta Platforms operates Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger with 3.35B+ daily active users. Q4 2025 revenue of $59.89B (up 24%), net income $22.77B. FY2026 capex guidance of $115-135B for AI infrastructure. Reality Labs operating loss of $19.2B in 2025.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Scored 9/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Scored 4/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($9,312,289,321 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (5/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 6/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 5/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).

thesis_continued: Key risks and concerns for Meta Platforms, Inc. based on financial analysis [1].
